name: Auric Minerals Corp.
description: Auric Minerals Corp. is an Ontario-based junior mineral exploration company focused primarily on uranium projects in Canada, having completed the acquisition of Central Uranium Resources Corp. to consolidate its uranium portfolio. The company holds option agreements on the Route 500, Bub, and Portage uranium properties in Labrador's prospective Central Mineral Belt, as well as the Caboose, Manic, and Kawip uranium properties in Quebec and the Goodeye property in British Columbia. Auric is at the grassroots exploration stage across its Canadian uranium portfolio.
